LLD Pipeline Order.detail: Guardrail → Retrieval → Classifier → Router → Resolver → Supervisor (ticket_service.py)

Deterministic Routing.detail: RouterAgent uses cached routing_rules.json — O(1) hash lookup, no LLM

Security Guardrail.detail: PII redaction + injection regex + Gemini scan; pipeline halt on SECURITY_FAIL

Privacy / PII.detail: Email, phone, secrets redacted before retrieval and downstream LLM

Responsible AI.detail: low_grounding flags, Hand 3 human review, audit trail per agent step

Ethical AI.detail: No auto-assign without grace period; transparent hand/department on every ticket

RAG Grounding.detail: Chroma + keyword Jaccard + rag_gate trusted match before Hand 1

Scalability.detail: Chroma ANN O(log n), process caches, background index warm, SQLite → Postgres-ready ORM

Cost Efficiency.detail: Local ONNX embeddings (MiniLM), keyword short-circuit, resolver skips LLM on RAG hit

Open Source / Offline.detail: RAG_EMBEDDING_BACKEND=local, Chroma, keyword index — demo without embed API

API Integration Ready.detail: Gemini client swappable; settings-driven models; SMTP hooks for notifications

Dynamic Configuration.detail: routing_rules.json, supervisor_mode, rag_corpus_mode, department taxonomy via config

UC1 Use Case Alignment.detail: Three Hands, dept queues, employee + agent + admin portals, specialists desk

llm_judge.verdict: SAARTHI demonstrates exceptional routing accuracy and a well-engineered architecture, though its current pipeline latency presents a significant challenge for high-volume, real-time ITSM environments.
strengths: Outstanding routing accuracy with 100% pass rate and perfect macro-F1 score.
Robust 5-step agent pipeline architecture leveraging modern components like Chroma RAG and Gemini.
Smart optimizations implemented, including keyword short-circuiting and local ONNX embeddings, showing engineering foresight.
Deterministic router enhances reliability, predictability, and auditability of routing decisions.
Strong evaluation rigor demonstrated through independent Master50 testing and comprehensive metric reporting.
improvements: Significantly reduce overall pipeline latency, especially in retrieval, classification, and resolver stages, to enhance real-time performance and scalability.
Provide explicit details and features regarding data privacy, PII handling, and compliance for sensitive ITSM data.
Detail the security measures implemented across the platform, including data at rest/in transit, access control, and vulnerability management.
Explore further optimizations for the resolver agent, which is the slowest component, to improve overall throughput.
Consider strategies for asynchronous processing or batching for certain pipeline steps to better handle high ticket volumes.
